notes: Official Florida Department of Revenue Property Tax Oversight statewide cadastral layer aggregating parcel data from all 67 county property appraisers. Exposes owner name and owner mailing address fields (physical/situs fields also present). Published as public record under Chapter 119, Florida Statutes. User approved this source for local ingestion on 2026-06-19; commercial/public republication, protected-address exclusions, and ongoing terms compliance remain operator responsibilities.
